message:
fix(gateway): Resolve TypeScript compilation errors in agent service and WebSocket handlers

- Fix sendMissedMessages calls in handlers.ts to include ws parameter
- Transform AgentState in setStateProvider to match checkpoint-compatible format
- Correct createErrorCheckpoint call signature with proper state and errorContext
- Add type cast in audit-redaction.test.ts for numeric phone masking test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
